consistency_fix_applied.description: UMB main.tex line 51 abstract still referred to the conjecture by its old name 'Trans-Stratum -2/9 Conjecture'. Left as-is, this would create an abstract/body contradiction with the patched conj:t2b body title 'Trans-stratum two-class conjecture'. The MM-03 HALT IF clause explicitly forbids any UMB → T2B → UMB reader path producing a contradiction after the patch.
consistency_fix_applied.resolution: Amended abstract line 51 to: 'Trans-stratum two-class conjecture (Class A at a_2/b_1^2 = -2/9, Class B at a_2/b_1^2 = +1/4) in precise form'. Faithful to the patch's stated additive intent; no Class A claim revoked.
consistency_fix_applied.out_of_scope_flag: Strictly outside the patch_relay_MM03.md OLD/NEW block, but inside the broader scope of MM-03 (consistency of conjecture references). Documented separately so papanokechi can override if desired.

unresolved_consistency_hints.description: The new UMB conj:t2b cites 'T2B Theorem 2 conditional on S_{12} != 0' and 'T2B Theorem 3 + Cor. classB-pi'. These theorem numbers and the corollary label classB-pi need to be verified against the actual T2B v2.0 manuscript. If T2B uses different numbering, the inconsistency will surface in the next coherence audit.
unresolved_consistency_hints.action_required: Open T2B v2.0 (Zenodo 10.5281/zenodo.19801038) and confirm that (a) Theorem 2 is the resonance/Stokes statement, (b) Theorem 3 is the Wallis-Stieltjes statement, (c) cor:classB-pi is the corollary establishing Q·pi^-1 limits.

unresolved_consistency_hints.description: After the global Tier→Obstruction Tier O rename, several sentences in #14 read more clunkily (e.g., 'first numerical audit of the Obstruction Tier O0 j-distribution'). Mathematically correct but stylistically marginal.
unresolved_consistency_hints.action_required: Optional light pass on #14 before submission; not blocking.
